description: A customer needs to reschedule an existing service appointment for next week.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's existing appointment in the scheduling system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the appointment for this Thursday at 10 AM.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the existing appointment to free up the service bay and technician.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cancels the original appointment.

nodes.task_description: Find a new available slot next week and book the rescheduled appointment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a slot for next Tuesday at 2 PM and confirms it with the customer.
